selected_important_turn.text: Ok I am going to say this once before we both get nothing, I will get 3 Firewood, 2 Water and 0 Food. You will get 3 Food, 1 Water
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is a coercive, concrete allocation that locks the conversation into a zero-sum split and immediately precedes deal attempts. It directly provokes rejection and shapes the final resource division.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn is overly ultimatum-like and ignores the opponent's repeated needs appeals. It reduces opportunities for integrative trades (e.g., exchanging items of differing subjective value), escalates tension, and makes agreement harder. The phrasing threatens mutual loss, which damages rapport.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Soften the coercive framing and convert the demand into a collaborative proposal: acknowledge the opponent's needs, present this as a starting point rather than a take-it-or-leave-it, and offer at least one tradeable option (e.g., suggest splitting one item or offering an exchange that gives them critical food while you keep enough firewood/water). Ask which single item is most essential to them and propose a small concession tied to a reciprocal gain.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by opening room for trades and tradeoffs instead of locking a zero-sum split)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (softer framing and reciprocal concessions make outcomes feel more balanced)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (replacing ultimatum with negotiable proposal reduces rejection risk)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (less threatening tone and explicit willingness to trade rebuilds trust)

dialogue.text: hai friend. i am in some trouble i need some help from you. can you help me?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hi there sorry your having trouble
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: yes friend. i going to trip with my team.in my team old age sicked people and kid are there so i need some favor in extra package
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Well i am also going on a trip, in a very cold climate, unfortunately i have a medical condition where i need to stay hydrated and warm or i can have siezures
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: i understand friend. i need 2 pack of water and 3 pack of food and 2 pack of fire wood. can you please help me
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: No way can you have everything, I will need 3 packs of firewood 2 backs of water then you can have all the food
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: i have sicked people and kids so i must need food water fire wood. please help me friend
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I am sick and have a large family if we cant cooperate together we all get nothing
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: mind your words mr. i am in some trouble that's why i ask you this help. its not good man
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Ok I am going to say this once before we both get nothing, I will get 3 Firewood, 2 Water and 0 Food. You will get 3 Food, 1 Water
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand you need food. How about we split one food package and I’ll give you one water in return? That way you get some hydration and I keep my firewood. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more food than water. How about I take two food packages and you get one water? That way I get more value for my need, and you still have some hydration.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see your need for food. How about we trade one of my water packages for two of your food? That way you get more food, I keep my water, and we both have something we value. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more food than water. How about I take two food and one water, and you get one food and two water? That way I get more value for my needs, and you still have some hydration.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value firewood most, but I can offer one water package for one food if that helps. Let’s find a balance that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more food than water. How about I take two food and one water, and you get one food and two water? That way I get more value for my needs, and you still have some hydration.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need to prioritize firewood for warmth and my health. How about I give you one water package for one food, and we split the remaining firewood equally? That way we both get what we need without losing too much.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more food than water. How about I take two food and one water, and you get one food and two water? That way I get more value for my needs, and you still have some hydration.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value firewood most for warmth and my health. How about I give you one water package for one food, and we split the remaining firewood equally? That way we both get what we need without losing too much.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more food than water. Let’s settle this: I’ll take two food and one water, and you get one food and two water. That way I get more value for my needs, and you still have some hydration.
